questions.text: On the first night of holidays, Rohan wants to play until very late because there is no school tomorrow. What choice helps him enjoy the next day too?

options.text: Play until he feels completely exhausted
Decide based on how tired he feels later
Set a play limit and save energy for tomorrow

questions.text: During holidays, Meera shifts her sleep time every night and feels confused in the mornings. What helps her days feel smoother?

options.text: Sleep very late and wake suddenly
Keep a loose but regular sleep rhythm

questions.text: Arjun plans gaming, movies, and outings all in one day. By evening, he feels drained. What would help him enjoy activities longer?

options.text: Space activities with rest in between

questions.text: Late-night movies feel exciting, but the next morning feels slow. What explains this change?

options.text: The body clock needs consistency to recharge

questions.text: At night, messages keep coming while Aman is on holiday. He enjoys chatting but feels tired the whole day after. What helps him keep energy?

options.text: Create a clear stop time for chatting
Stay up and wake later to adjust
